DamageMeter.name: 皮皮统计: Skada
DamageMeter.changelog: 修复升级卡详细构成显示英文 ID
changelog_detail: 伤害、格挡、卡牌等详细构成现在会先去掉统计用的升级后缀再查游戏本地化，最后把 + 追加回本地化牌名。
修复中文界面中升级卡显示 BASH+ 等英文 ID 的问题，升级卡现在会显示为 痛击+ 这类中文牌名。
DamageMeter.changelog_en: Localize upgraded card names in Skada details
changelog_detail_en: Damage/detail breakdowns now strip the analytics upgrade suffix before looking up card localization, then append the upgrade marker back to the localized title.
Fixes Chinese UI entries such as BASH+ showing raw English IDs; upgraded cards now display with the current game locale plus the upgrade suffix.

SpeedX.name: 皮皮极速: SpeedX
SpeedX.changelog: 修复 v0.107.1 自动结束回合偶发失效并加固黑屏卡住防护
changelog_detail: 桥接 v0.107.1 的 EndPlayerTurnAction 语义变化：构造函数仍是 Player,int，但这个 int 已从 CombatState.RoundNumber 改成 PlayerCombatState.TurnNumber。
SpeedX 现在会在运行时选择正确的结束/撤销结束计数，同时保留 v0.103.2 兼容性，修复 v0.107.1 额外回合或多人 turn number 分歧时自动结束动作被游戏忽略的问题。
自动结束回合现在会复用游戏结束回合按钮同级别的安全窗口：必须是玩家侧、PlayerCombatState 已进入 Play 阶段、没有正在结算的卡牌/药水效果或本地动作、手牌 UI 也不能处于出牌/选牌模式。这样可以降低自动结束在瞬态战斗 UI 状态触发后造成黑屏或转场卡住的风险。
同步检查了 v0.107.1 下 SpeedX 启动、ModConfig、自动拾取、自动前进、自动索敌、跳横幅、卡牌飞行、冻帧移除、计时器/VFX 与快捷出牌补丁目标。
SpeedX.changelog_en: Fix auto-end turn on STS2 v0.107.1 and harden stuck-transition guards
changelog_detail_en: Bridges the v0.107.1 EndPlayerTurnAction semantic change: the constructor still takes Player,int, but the int is now PlayerCombatState.TurnNumber instead of CombatState.RoundNumber.
SpeedX now chooses the correct end-turn/undo counter at runtime, preserving v0.103.2 compatibility while fixing ignored auto-end actions on v0.107.1 extra-turn or multiplayer turn-number divergence.

Auto-end now mirrors the game end-turn button safety window before enqueueing: combat must be on the player side, PlayerCombatState must be in Play phase, no card/potion effect or local action may be running, and the hand UI must not be in card-play or selection mode. This reduces the risk of black-screen/stuck transitions if auto-end fires during transient combat UI states.

Existing SpeedX v0.107.1 startup, ModConfig, auto-loot, auto-proceed, auto-target, banner skip, card-flight, hit-stop, timer, VFX, and quick-play patch targets were checked against logs and current decompiled signatures.

RemoveMultiplayerPlayerLimit.name: Remove Multiplayer Player Limit
RemoveMultiplayerPlayerLimit.changelog: 适配 v0.99 beta 新 mod 结构
changelog_detail: 新增 v0.99 格式 manifest（外部 JSON + id + affects_gameplay）
多人联机 API 无破坏性变更，Harmony patches 全部兼容

Rewind.name: 皮皮倒带: Rewind
Rewind.changelog: 修复 v0.107.1 下一键重开无法生效
changelog_detail: 将 Rewind「一键重开」的新种子生成改走共享 STS2 兼容层，不再静态绑定 SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(int)。
同一个 DLL 同时覆盖 v0.103.2 的 SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(int) 与 v0.107.1 的 SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(Rng?, int) 签名。
修复 v0.107.1 下从地图历史面板或快捷键触发一键重开时，在确认对话框前就因 MissingMethodException 失效的问题。
Rewind.changelog_en: Fix v0.107.1 Reroll Run seed generation
changelog_detail_en: Routes Rewind's Reroll Run seed generation through the shared STS2 compatibility facade instead of binding directly to SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(int).
Covers the v0.103.2 SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(int) signature and the v0.107.1 SeedHelper.GetRandomSeed(Rng?, int) signature with one DLL.
Fixes the map-history Reroll Run button/hotkey failing on v0.107.1 with MissingMethodException before the confirmation dialog can start a new run.

ModConfig.name: 皮皮配置: ModConfig
ModConfig.changelog: 重新打包发布 zip，移除 legacy mod_manifest.json 修复游戏菜单里的重复模组条目
changelog_detail: 游戏 v0.99+ 起 <ModId>.json 是唯一的外部 root manifest，但 mod loader 依然会扫描 legacy mod_manifest.json —— 同目录两份 manifest 会被 loader 各自注册为独立模组条目，游戏菜单里就出现同名的红色「已加载」坏条目。
上一版发布 zip 里同时带了两份 manifest。虽然 ModManager.ps1 安装/更新时会调用 Remove-LegacyExternalManifest 清理玩家目录，但 zip 里还带着 mod_manifest.json，紧跟的 Copy-Item 又把它复制回来，等于白清理。
本版重新打包的 zip 只含 <Mod>.json + DLL + PCK，不含 mod_manifest.json。没有代码变更。从上一版更新过来时，ModManager 会删掉玩家目录里残留的 mod_manifest.json，重复条目消失。
ModConfig.changelog_en: repackage release zip without legacy mod_manifest.json to fix duplicate mod entry in game menu
changelog_detail_en: Game v0.99+ introduced <ModId>.json as the sole external root manifest. The mod loader still scans for legacy mod_manifest.json - so when a deployed folder contains both, the loader registers them as two separate mod entries and the game menu shows a duplicate red 'already loaded' row for that mod.

Releases up to and including the previous version shipped both manifests in the zip. Even though ModManager.ps1's install/update path calls Remove-LegacyExternalManifest to clean the target directory, the cleanup was undone because the zip still contained mod_manifest.json and the subsequent Copy-Item step re-deposited it.

This release ships a repackaged zip that contains only <Mod>.json + DLL + PCK. No code changes. Updating from the previous version will trigger ModManager to remove the old mod_manifest.json from the player's game folder and the duplicate entry disappears.

QuickLink.name: 皮皮快连: QuickLink
QuickLink.changelog: 恢复 v0.107 多人读档 setup patch 绑定
changelog_detail: 多人存档载入 timing Harmony patch 改为运行时解析 RunManager.SetUpSavedMultiPlayer / SetUpSavedMultiplayer。
保留 v0.103.2 的 Postfix 路径，并让 v0.107.0 下的战斗同步绕过日志与安全兜底继续生效。
QuickLink.changelog_en: Restore v0.107 multiplayer setup patch binding
changelog_detail_en: Changes the saved-multiplayer timing Harmony patch to resolve RunManager.SetUpSavedMultiPlayer/SetUpSavedMultiplayer at runtime.
Preserves the v0.103.2 postfix path and keeps QuickLink's v0.107.0 combat-sync bypass logging and safety pass active.
